system.description: You have become, in the fullest expression of the Iron Sutra's most profound claim, the bridge between flesh and the divine. Your forge work is not merely technical — it is, in a specific and inarguable sense, sacred. All allies in the encounter immediately recover to full HP. All conditions and debuffs are Cleansed from all allies. All allies gain Regen 4 for 3 turns and Shield equal to your RESONANCE × 4. Once per combat — this is everything you have trained to be, given freely.
